anchors.9-10: No errors; academic register; precise use of research terminology
anchors.7-8: Occasional errors; does not impair academic communication
anchors.5-6: Some errors that reduce academic impression

anchors.9-10: Methodology critiqued accurately; statistical concepts correct; limitations balanced
anchors.5-6: Some inaccuracies in methodology or statistics

anchors.9-10: Clearly connects findings to clinical practice; nuanced discussion of applicability
anchors.7-8: Good clinical connection; some nuance missing
anchors.3-4: Little connection between research and clinical practice

anchors.9-10: Engaging, confident, well-structured; fields questions expertly
anchors.7-8: Mostly fluent; good structure; occasional hesitation
anchors.5-6: Adequate but some hesitation or awkward structure

anchors.9-10: Exceptional empathy and professionalism; creates psychological safety
anchors.7-8: Good empathy; acknowledges emotion; polite and professional
anchors.5-6: Adequate but mechanical empathy; some emotional cues missed
anchors.3-4: Little empathic response; information delivery prioritized
anchors.1-2: No empathic response; dismissive or unprofessional

checklist.item: study design correctly identified and described
statistical significance and clinical significance distinguished
clinical applicability to own practice discussed
PICO framework referenced explicitly or implicitly
